message:
feat(events): add Replay and Since functions for event log recovery

Implement event log replay and filtering for crash recovery:
- Replay(since time.Time) - reads events from log file to channel
- Since(ts time.Time) - returns events after timestamp as slice
- ReplaySession(session, since) - filter by session
- SinceByType(eventType, since) - filter by event type
- EventCount(since) - count events after timestamp
- LastEvent() - get most recent event

Completes ntm-0fx2: Event Log with replay

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
